title: Bug, no bug, or just undefined, that is the question (real vs. signed and unsigned int)

features.name: ternary operator with real literal in alternate branch
features.description: Code should include a ternary operator where one branch is a real literal (0.0) and the other is a negative integer, assigned to a 64-bit signal

features.name: nested ternary with negative literal in inner branch
features.description: Code should include a nested ternary expression where the inner branch returns a negative literal and the outer alternate is a real literal

features.name: negative literal assignment to wide bit vector in mixed type context
features.description: Code should include a negative signed literal (-1) being assigned to a 64-bit signal where the expression context involves both integer and real operands
